message:
test(pty): expand from 40 to 82 tests for PTY system (wa-2k2bf)

Add 42 new tests across lib.rs (24) and cmdbuilder.rs (18):
- PtySize: all-fields custom, zero dimensions, max u16, copy
  independence, inequality per field, debug format, reflexive equality
- ExitStatus: code 255/max_u32, empty signal string, signal code
  is always 1, clone with/without signal, display formatting for
  various codes and signals, success-only-for-zero verification
- CommandBuilder: env set/get/override/remove/clear, iter_extra_env,
  from_argv edge cases, as_unix_command_line edge cases, inequality
  checks, cwd overwrite, controlling_tty toggle, clone independence,
  env with empty/special values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
